title: Spellbook
description: This is a magic mod, not of magics...
body:
![Spellbook Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d258d81b7086b2bb858f62bb8ed4421cd2698a1f.png)

### • ABOUT •
This mod adds a wide range of new blocks and items, including machines and utility blocks...

Keep in mind that this is a magic-themed mod, but not a magics one...

It is a TECH mod that introduces various machines and technical blocks/items.

My mod features an entirely new system called ARCANA...
This new system is the foundation of the mod. You'll literally use it for everything...

Crafting, new blocks and items, ingots and more. Unlocking powerful "MAGICS" blocks and items.

### My Mod has 3 BIG TIERS...
• Enchanted
• Arcane
• Star

I hope you enjoy the mod! It's currently in **BETA**, so stay tuned for more amazing updates!
